#### What's Changed

- Fix p9/server.go race condition. by [@​dotwaffle](https://redirect.github.com/dotwaffle) in [#​105](https://redirect.github.com/hugelgupf/p9/pull/105)
- Fix build by [@​hugelgupf](https://redirect.github.com/hugelgupf) in [#​107](https://redirect.github.com/hugelgupf/p9/pull/107)
- fix: don't set parent on xattr walk fidRefs by [@​dotwaffle](https://redirect.github.com/dotwaffle) in [#​106](https://redirect.github.com/hugelgupf/p9/pull/106)
- p9ufs: improve command line help by [@​abitrolly](https://redirect.github.com/abitrolly) in [#​94](https://redirect.github.com/hugelgupf/p9/pull/94)

#### New Contributors

- [@​dotwaffle](https://redirect.github.com/dotwaffle) made their first contribution in [#​105](https://redirect.github.com/hugelgupf/p9/pull/105)
